steps.title: Set up the dimensions
steps.content: Width is $w$ feet. The length is $73$ times the width, so length $=73w$ feet. Area $=$ length $\times$ width gives $$y=(73w)(w).$$

steps.title: Interpret the factor
steps.content: In $(73w)(w)$, the factor $w$ is the width, so $(73w)$ must be the length. That confirms A is correct.
